fragment.choose:
<when condition="@{
      var allowed = (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("allowed-groups", "");
      if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(allowed)) { return false; }
      var jwt = (Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"];
      if (!jwt.Claims.ContainsKey("groups")) { return true; }
      var tokenGroups = jwt.Claims["groups"];
      var allowedList = allowed.Split(',').Select(g => g.Trim()).Where(g => g.Length > 0);
      return !allowedList.Any(a => tokenGroups.Contains(a));
    }">
      
        
        
          application/json
        
        @(new JObject(
          new JProperty("error", "insufficient_group"),
          new JProperty("error_description", "User is not a member of any allowed group for this MCP server.")
        ).ToString())
